info.name: Combined Plasma APIs — Complete
info.description: Unified API Documentation for the Plasma backend. Merges the robust SRS v1.0 IDEAL definitions with the traditional standard routes. Covers Authentication (Steam + Traditional), Social Feed, Games Library, Rallies, Prestige, Notifications, and Direct Messaging.

request.description: Registers a new user with an email and password. Requires a valid steamToken obtained from the Steam OAuth callback to link the account. Returns a JWT token. This endpoint automatically triggers a background Steam sync for both the game library and achievements.
Logs in an existing user using email or username, and their password. Returns a JWT token.
Dev-only login. Returns a JWT token. Seeded users: Wahaj, Ahmed, Sarah, Ali, Omar. Copy the `token` and set it in the Authorization header for all further requests.
Redirects the browser to Valve's OpenID 2.0 endpoint to begin Steam authentication (BR-1). No password is ever stored by Plasma.
Valve redirects here after the user approves the OpenID login. The backend validates the assertion, creates/fetches the PlasmaUser mapped to the SteamID64, and returns a session JWT.
Returns the authenticated user's full profile including SteamID64, PlasmaUserID, linked Steam data, current Intent Mode, and Plasma XP total.
Checks if the supplied JWT token is still valid. Returns 200 if valid, 401 if expired or tampered. Useful for the frontend to gate protected routes on page load without fetching the full /me profile.
Returns precise status of each dependency. Used by monitoring, load balancers, and CI pipelines to determine if the server is truly healthy — not just alive.

originalRequest.description: Returns precise status of each dependency. Used by monitoring, load balancers, and CI pipelines to determine if the server is truly healthy — not just alive.

request.description: Returns another user's public profile: username, Steam status, Intent Mode badge, Hall of Fame, Plasma XP, and mutual follow status.
Searches for users by username. Returns results including 'isRequested' (follow request sent) and 'isMutual' (already friends) flags relative to the current user.
Retrieves the authenticated user's application settings (notifications, privacy preferences, timezone, etc.).
Persists user application settings.
Toggles the user's global Intent Mode. Options: COMP, CHILL, OFFLINE. Broadcasts a status change event to The Pulse (REQ-12, REQ-13).

item.name: Delete Account (GDPR — Right to be Forgotten)

request.description: Permanently queues the authenticated user's data for deletion within 30 days: SteamID64, social graph, posts, RSVPs, and Rally history. Satisfies GDPR/CCPA Right to be Forgotten requirement.

query.description: Options: all, my-posts, friends, comp, chill
Optional Intent Mode filter: COMP, CHILL (REQ-14)
Optional profile filter to fetch timeline for a specific user

request.description: Returns the unified activity feed from /api/feed. Merges live Steam status events with user-generated Moments. Supporting filters: all, my-posts (current user), friends (mutual friends), comp (Competitive intent users), chill (Chill intent users).
Publishes a text, image, or video clip Moment to the author's followers' Pulse feed.
Updates an existing post. Only the author can update. Body can include content and/or mediaURL.
Permanently removes a post authored by the authenticated user.
Returns the authenticated user's friends who are on Plasma.
Returns the subset of followed users who are currently online/active.

Removes a follow relationship via the /api/friends router. Also clears the isMutual flag on the reverse relationship if it existed. Note: there is also DELETE /api/users/:userId/follow on the users router — both do the same thing but are separate route handlers.
Follows a user. Mutual following unlocks Double Opt-In private interaction.
Searches for users by username (case-insensitive) for the friend request system. Excludes the requesting user.
Returns the activity feed (posts) for a specific user. Enforces mutual friendship privacy rules (BR-1) unless the requester is viewing their own timeline.

Triggers an optimized manual sync of the Steam Web API to fetch the user's owned games (including played free games) and playtime. Also syncs the user's Steam profile picture (avatarfull) to the Plasma profile. Uses high-performance batch processing with UNNEST and directly links high-resolution Steam CDN cover art (library_600x900.jpg), bypassing IGDB for significantly faster execution.

**Error Responses:**
- `403 Forbidden` — Returned when the target Steam user's Game Details privacy setting is not set to Public. Response body: `{ "success": false, "message": "User's profile is private" }`

Polls (or returns cached) live Steam statuses for the user's friend network via the Steam Web API. Uses Steam's GetPlayerSummaries API which returns basic public info (persona name, avatar, online status) regardless of the target user's privacy settings.

Gets the Steam player summary (persona name, avatar, online status, current game) for the given SteamID64.

**Error Responses:**
- `403 Forbidden` — Returned if the Steam API denies access due to a private profile. Response body: `{ "success": false, "message": "User's profile is private" }`
- `404 Not Found` — The SteamID64 does not correspond to any Steam account.

Gets the authenticated user's Steam achievements for a specific game by Steam AppID.

**Error Responses:**
- `400 Bad Request` — Steam account is not linked to this Plasma user.
- `403 Forbidden` — Returned if the Steam API denies access due to a private profile. Response body: `{ "success": false, "message": "User's profile is private" }`

Syncs Steam achievements for all Steam games in the user's library. Also syncs the user's Steam profile picture (avatarfull) to the Plasma profile. Optimized with high-performance bulk database operations to handle large achievement sets instantly. Updates the profile's totalPlasmaXP directly in the profiles table.

**Error Responses:**
- `403 Forbidden` — Returned when all games fail with a 403 and no achievements could be processed (i.e., the user's Game Details are set to private on Steam). Response body: `{ "success": false, "message": "User's profile is private" }`
Returns the combined library of Steam-synced and manually added games for the authenticated user.

Searches the IGDB database for games by name. Returns up to 20 results with high-resolution 1080p cover art URLs, platform information, and release dates (ISO format YYYY-MM-DD). Uses the Twitch OAuth token with persistent caching, automatic retry (3x with exponential backoff), and 10s timeouts. Response includes: id (igdb_<id>), title, coverArtURL, releaseDate, url.

Adds a non-Steam game to the user's Omni-Library. If no coverArtURL is provided, the backend automatically searches IGDB by title and fetches a high-res 1080p cover image. Games are tagged with the NON_STEAM platform type. If the game title already exists as a manual entry, it reuses the existing gameId.
Returns the combined games library for a specific user. Visibility is subject to user privacy settings.

item.name: Get My Prestige Profile (Plasma XP + Hall of Fame)

request.description: Allows users to manually track achievements and milestones from non-Steam platforms (e.g., Valorant, console games). These milestones contribute to the user's total Plasma XP and can be showcased in the Hall of Fame.
Returns the list of upcoming rallies organized by a specific user. Visibility is restricted to mutual friends only (BR-1).

item.name: 9. Direct Messaging (BR-2)

request.description: Retrieves the Inbox summary for the logged-in user. Provides the latest message for every active conversation they have, alongside the username and avatar of the person they are talking to.

Alternative post creation endpoint on the feed router (feed.js). Accepts the same body as POST /api/pulse/posts but is a separate route handler. Valid types: MOMENT, ACHIEVEMENT_UNLOCK, ACTIVITY_UPDATE, RALLY_BROADCAST. Both /api/feed/posts and /api/pulse/posts are live.

Alternative post deletion endpoint on the feed router (feed.js). Only the post author can delete. Returns 404 if the post doesn't exist or doesn't belong to the caller. Mirrors DELETE /api/pulse/posts/:postId.
Retrieves direct messages between the authenticated user and the target user. Will return 403 Forbidden if Double Opt-In rules (BR-2) are not met.
Sends a direct message or external lobby invite. Strictly blocked by the backend if Double Opt-In rules (BR-2) are not satisfied.

item.description: REST endpoints for managing chat history and inbox state. Real-time message delivery is handled via WebSocket connection at ws://localhost:5000/ws/chat?token={{JWT_TOKEN}}.
